rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §7.043 addresses career readiness goals and has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
quote: Sec. 7.043. STATEWIDE GOAL FOR CAREER READINESS. (a) Using the data posted under Section 7.0405(a), the agency shall create a quantifiable statewide goal for public school students to achieve career readiness, including by attaining a workforce-aligned credential while in high school.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
